title: ericoides sphaerocephalum
intro: Ericoides sphaerocephalum, also known as globe daisy or white daisy bush, is a flowering shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and it is also believed to have antiseptic and antifungal properties. Ericoides sphaerocephalum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits.
